title: lithocarpus monticola
intro: Lithocarpus monticola, also known as the Coast Live Oak, is a deciduous or evergreen tree species native to the Pacific coast of North America. The plant's bark, leaves, and roots have been traditionally used in folk medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lithocarpus monticola include treating fever, sore throats, and skin conditions, as well as being used as a natural remedy for wounds and infections. Lithocarpus monticola can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health issues.
